login.headline: An app for
login.tagline: Say what you want. Easy and without pressure.
login.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
login.forgot_sub: Enter your email and we'll send you a link.
login.forgot_success: Check your email! We've sent a reset link.
login.privacy_footer: Private and secure — just the two of you.
login.reset_sub: Choose a new password for your account.
login.feature_wish_desc: Add what you're in the mood for. Your partner sees it and responds when they're ready.
login.feature_date_desc: No ambiguity. Suggest when it works and see what your partner is open to.
login.feature_memories_desc: Keep track of what you've planned, done — and what's next.
login.feature_privacy_desc: Only the two of you see your data. Delete everything whenever you want.

onboarding.step1_body: A private app for the two of you — wish from each other, respond at your own pace, without pressure.
onboarding.step2_item1_desc: Share what you're open to. Your partner sees your ideas and can wish for them.
onboarding.step2_item2_desc: Browse your partner's ideas and send a wish when you're in the mood.
onboarding.step2_item3_desc: Accept, say "not now", or change your mind — without explaining why.

pairing.title: Connect
pairing.subtitle: Hi {name}! Connect with your partner.
pairing.my_code_label: Your code – send it to your partner
pairing.qr_instruction: Let your partner scan the code with their phone
pairing.scan_title: Point the camera at your partner's QR code

home.greeting: How do you want to be spoiled by {name}?
home.greeting_snusk: What would make your day with {name} extra hot?
home.blocked_date: Not open for this on that day
home.snusk_open_none: {name} is not feeling very adventurous today
home.snusk_open_many: There are {count} fantasies to explore with {name} today
home.empty_hint: Tap a day to set your availability
home.notif_hint_body: Enable notifications to see when {name} responds
home.mode_hint: Switch mode with the button top right — Light for everyday wishes, Dark for more intimate ones.
home.my_snusk_open_none: You have nothing open today — tap to change
home.snusk_optin_hint: In dark mode, all fantasies are closed by default. Open them in the calendar for the days you're up for it.

orders.empty_body: This is where wishes between you and {name} will appear.
orders.howto_1: Go to the home page and pick a gesture or fantasy
orders.howto_2: {name} gets a notification and can respond at their own pace
orders.howto_3: Accept, say not now, or change your mind — no explanations needed
orders.consent_accept_hint: Showing interest creates no expectations. You can always change your mind.

calendar.open_hint_fint: What are you open to on this day? (everything is on by default)
calendar.open_hint_snusk: Snusk is closed by default — open what you're in the mood for
calendar.empty_hint: Tap a day to set your availability

services.notif_denied: Notifications are blocked – allow them in your browser settings
services.notif_unsupported: This device does not support notifications
services.no_ideas: No ideas yet — add your first one above

settings.gdpr_desc: You have the right to access and delete all data we have about you. Below you can export your information or permanently delete your account.
settings.accessibility_desc: Couply follows WCAG 2.1 Level AA. The app works with screen readers, keyboard navigation and all screen sizes.
settings.delete_dialog_body: All your data will be permanently deleted — profile, services, orders and calendar. This cannot be undone.
